title: Solid Grass Block
description: Adds solid variant of all grass blocks.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8b0182f4998a8e975eba249cc4f17d282af29c1.png)

Adds solid variant of all grass blocks: **Solid Grass Block**, **Solid Dirt Path**, **Solid Podzol**, **Solid Mycelium**, **Solid Crimson Nylium** and **Solid Warped Nylium**.

### How to obtain
- **Solid Grass Block**: right click regular **Grass Block** with bone meal on any side except the top.
- **Solid Dirt Path**: right click regular **Dirt Path** with a shovel on any side except the top.
- **Solid Podzol**: right click regular **Podzol** with bone meal on any side except the top.
- **Solid Mycelium**: right click regular **Mycelium** with bone meal on any side except the top.
- **Solid Crimson Nylium**: right click regular **Crimson Nylium** with bone meal on any side except the top.
- **Solid Warped Nylium**: right click regular **Warped Nylium** with bone meal on any side except the top.

### Special features
- **Solid Grass Block** can be eaten by mobs (e.g sheep). However, it does not turn into **Dirt** block. Instead, mobs will only eat the top surface of the block, which will eventually regrow into a full **Solid Grass Block**. This feature can be useful for automatic farms.
- **Solid Dirth Path** can be turned into a full cube block by right-clicking it with a shovel.

Report bugs or give me a feedback on [Github](https://github.com/thebluetropics/solid-grass-block) or [Discord](https://discord.gg/A9hgghDk48).
